title: Procheiron audit event
description: One JSON object per non-empty line of {paths.memory}/index/audit.jsonl. The audit log is heterogeneous and append-only: it carries compact propose-helper events, full promotion/lifecycle events, proposal/gate/containment events, and migration events. additionalProperties is intentionally true (the log must accept new event shapes without a schema bump). The live validator does NOT field-check audit events today; this schema is therefore advisory (severity=warning) EXCEPT the promotion-family constraint, which backs the active/validated corroboration check. See severity_map.json.

prev_hash.description: entry_hash of the preceding audit event (GENESIS for the first) — the tamper-evident hash chain. See chain.py.

entry_hash.description: BLAKE2b hex binding prev_hash + this event's canonical content; recomputed and continuity-checked by the validator when lint verify_audit_chain is on.

sig.description: Optional ed25519 signature hex over entry_hash by the actor. Verified against known_actor_keys when lint verify_signatures is on.

sig_key_id.description: Identity whose registered public key verifies `sig` — normally the event's actor.

allOf.$comment: Either action or event_type names the event kind.

Promotion family: a memory_promoted/memory_validated event must independently corroborate a record — it needs the target memory_id and the resulting status (validate_procheiron2 event_supports, lines 344-366).
